---
title: "Oceanography"
subtitle: "Physical and chemical properties of the world's oceans and their geographic significance."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include oceanography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Oceanography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include oceanography/01-origin-of-ocean-basins.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/02-ocean-floor-relief.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/03-temperature-salinity-density.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/04-waves-tides-currents.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/05-sea-level-changes.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/06-coral-reefs.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include oceanography/07-oceanic-hazards.md >}}

---
